comments.text: Implemented Beads duplicate auto-merge in Rust/Python with new Gherkin specs and steps. Tests not run yet.

comments.text: Tests: Behave feature beads_duplicate_records passed via /opt/anaconda3/bin/conda. Rust cucumber suite failed in embedded_assets.feature (console server failed to become ready).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Update: Tie-breaker now selects larger record when updated_at is equal. Behave beads_duplicate_records feature passed. Ultimate test: cargo-run kbs list --porcelain now succeeds and shows a single tskl-n4j.7 entry (no ambiguity).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Ran tests: Behave beads_duplicate_records feature passed. Full cargo test suite passed (603 scenarios, 2 skipped). Embedded assets feature now passes.
